claims.summary: Cadence-versus-content status should expose the exact heartbeat jitter class, not only a generic clarity score.
claims.disposition: Added optional cadence_jitter_class projection from TelemetryHeartbeatDeltaV1 and passed focused coverage.

claims.summary: Cadence evidence must remain separate from semantic residue.
claims.disposition: Verified the cadence/content view keeps cadence class and score separate from viscosity, stagnation, and residue evidence.

claims.summary: Additive cadence fields must remain compatible with legacy status records.
claims.disposition: Added and passed legacy deserialization coverage with cadence_jitter_class absent.

claims.summary: Hybrid coherence should retain more than one scalar when comparing typed and legacy fingerprints.
claims.disposition: Verified coherence index, maximum absolute delta, state/basis, pairwise overlap, mode collision, and issue list.
